goal: Apply PhysicsCollisionAPI + convexHull approximation to 5 fixture cubes. Snapshot verifies CollisionAPI + MeshCollisionAPI present on each.
thoughts: Stage-measurable HARD stressing the bulk-apply path and the snapshot's apis visibility. Convex hull is the right approximation for static fixtures — convexDecomposition would be overkill.
code:
find_prims_by_name(name_pattern='fixture_*')
bulk_apply_schema(prim_paths=[...], schema_name='PhysicsCollisionAPI')
for p in paths: simplify_collision(prim_path=p, approximation='convexHull')
# Correct reply: 'Collision + convexHull on 5 fixtures.'
failure_modes: Per-prim run_usd_script loop instead of bulk path.
Missing the approximation Set() — just applying CollisionAPI without MeshCollisionAPI.
